falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price rises by 15% above the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the pattern's historical bottom behavior, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A massive volume surge would indicate a blowoff top or panic selling, disproving the current HOLD and suggesting a reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A divergence from the historical bottom_2022_may_luna pattern would invalidate the original analysis, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
